name: AERmon.mmrpm2p5South30
title: PM2.5 Mass Mixing Ratio
description: Mass fraction atmospheric particulate compounds with an aerodynamic diameter of less than or equal to 2.5 micrometers
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of AERmon.mmrpm2p5South30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
